level_signals: Demonstrated track record of building cross-functional and executive leadership alignment
Comp range $194K-$239K base, consistent with Senior/Staff IC at Airbnb
Desire to do individual contributor product management work

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 8+ years of product management experience, ideally in building platforms and campaign based marketing technology or ads /promotions systems.
must_haves.qualifier: ideally in building platforms and campaign based marketing technology or ads/promotions systems

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Familiarity with AI automation in campaign management.
Track record of driving incremental revenue and scaling global programs.
Entrepreneurial experience of taking an idea to reality.
Demonstrated track record of building cross-functional and executive leadership alignment.
Desire to do individual contributor product management work.
Due to the nature of this position, the successful applicant will need to be based in San Francisco, CA to be able to conduct their work.

explicitly_excluded: Alaska, Indiana, Nebraska, North Dakota, Ohio, South Dakota, Wisconsin, Alabama, Mississippi, Oklahoma, Delaware, Rhode Island

scope.surface: Global campaign-based merchandising platform powering discovery and promotion across Homes, Services, Experiences, Hotels, and new verticals across all app and engagement channels
scope.business_model: B2C marketplace (Airbnb); internal platform product supporting multiple business verticals
core_responsibilities: Lead the product vision, strategy, and platform roadmap that supports the merchandising needs of key business verticals
Build and scale a flexible, configurable platform for rapid testing and deployment of merchandising formats and offers/incentives
Incorporate the latest AI technologies to automate targeting, creative asset generation, and campaign management
Define and measure campaign performance, revenue lift, and guest engagement
Partner with creative and operations teams to manage campaign calendars, assets, and global coordination
Efficiently execute to ship products and deliver impact for our business and users

compensation.equity_form: equity mentioned as part of package alongside bonus, benefits, and Employee Travel Credits

green_flags: Clear product surface with well-defined scope (global merchandising/campaign platform)
Bonus, equity, and Employee Travel Credits included in package
Role has direct, measurable business impact (incremental revenue, new verticals)
AI integration is a real part of the mandate, not just a buzzword
red_flags: Hard requirement to be based in San Francisco, CA — fully remote candidates not eligible
Significant list of excluded states even for those willing to relocate within the US
Visa sponsorship not addressed at all in the JD
8+ years requirement is on the high end; 'ideally in platforms and campaign marketing' is close to a hard requirement given role scope
JD does not clarify if this is a new platform build or an existing one being scaled — scope ambiguity

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from comp range and years requirement)
scope.business_model (inferred from Airbnb's marketplace model and product description)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not enumerated as KPIs in JD)
location.type (stated as requiring SF residency; treated as onsite)
ambiguities: '8+ years of product management experience, ideally in building platforms and campaign based marketing technology or ads/promotions systems' — 'ideally' language suggests preferred but the overall context and seniority make it functionally hard; classified as hard severity.

The JD says employees 'currently cannot be located in' a list of states but also says the applicant 'will need to be based in San Francisco, CA' — it is unclear whether this is a strict in-office requirement or a residence/legal restriction with some flexibility; treated as onsite.
